title: chilita discolor
intro: Chilita discolor, also known as the 'Mexican mint marigold', is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chilita discolor include its potential to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antihelmintic to expel intestinal worms. Herbal preparations of Chilita discolor include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
